analysis.rewritten_desc: Escape to a tranquil oasis in the heart of [Location]. Our newly renovated home is the perfect retreat for couples and families alike. With a private garden and off-street parking, you'll have all the amenities you need to unwind. The property sleeps up to 4 guests and is equipped with all the mod cons, making it an ideal base for exploring the local area. And with 7 reviews to date, we're confident you'll love our little corner of [Location].
top_amenity_gaps: None listed - consider highlighting local amenities such as bars and restaurants
analysis.photo_order_rec: The garden should be the cover photo as it's the standout feature of the property.
key_diagnosis: Your occupancy rate is significantly below the market average (20.7% vs 28.3%) - optimizing your listing to attract more guests could unlock an additional £3,446 in revenue (£173 x 71 open nights) over the next 90 days.
You're missing key high-value amenity categories such as Entertainment - consider adding local recommendations or facilities to improve your listing's appeal.
Your property has an unknown number of photos - consider adding more visuals to showcase the space and increase engagement (currently 0/10 for photo coverage).
analysis.outreach_hook: We think there's a big opportunity to boost occupancy and unlock more bookings - can you tell us more about your goals for this listing?
